commit_style.label: Commit style
commit_style.description: Format applied to every commit message. conventional = feat:/fix: prefixes, gitmoji = emoji prefixes, angular = Angular-style.

sign_commits.label: Sign commits
sign_commits.description: Whether to pass -S to git commit. Requires GPG or SSH signing configured.

co_authors.label: Co-authors
co_authors.description: List of Co-Authored-By trailers appended to every commit. Each entry is a string: 'Name <email>'.
